setup: 1. Save your audio file as: audio.mp3 (or keep original name)
2. Make sure both files are in the same directory as generate_video.py
4. Install FFmpeg: brew install ffmpeg (if not already installed)
notes: The script will automatically detect your audio file
Processing time depends on audio length (usually 2-5 minutes)
Final video will have perfect audio sync and high quality

technical.expectedFrames: Will be calculated from audio duration
